name: WA 01 — Message Ingestion

meta.description: Recebe webhook da Evolution API, filtra mensagens de grupos CASE e insere na fila wa_message_queue. Requer env: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, TEAM_MEMBER_JIDS (comma-separated JIDs da equipe)

notes:
## Configuração

### Variáveis de Ambiente N8N
```
SUPABASE_URL=https://knusqfbvhsqworzyhvip.supabase.co
SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY=<service_role_key_do_supabase>
TEAM_MEMBER_JIDS=5511999999999@s.whatsapp.net,5511888888888@s.whatsapp.net
```

### Evolution API — Configurar Webhook
- URL: https://<seu-n8n>.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/wa-ingest
- Events: messages.upsert
- Instance: producao002

### Como testar
Send POST to webhook URL com payload Evolution simulado
